text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um, you're that model, Gold City, aren't you? I've
always wanted to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I gotta get to training, so can we chat
another ti—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Then, can I at least get your autograph?! I have a
magazine with your picture in it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, I don't really do that sorta thing at school,
so uh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I really don't have time for this today...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa there, nuh-uh! Requests like that need to
go through her agency!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
City's a professional! If she handed out
autographs like candy, she'd be in deep
trouble! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I'm so sorry, I didn't know! I-I'll just be going
now!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Girl, you're so bad at saying no, it's legit
hilarious. ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Shoulda just told her the truth—if you give out
one autograph, you'll have the whole school
flocking around you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah... What was it she called me? "That
model"?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If that's still all people know me for, then I've got
a lotta work to do.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right, time to train. See ya.
